title: James Cassidy
html:
Stub. Mentor figure quoted by Yahir in late 2022 with two compressed founder-aphorisms. Likely an OSU professor, OSIG advisor, or family-orbit figure — identity context is thin.

Quoted lines (from 2022 12 16 james cassidy quotes)

"Don't be afraid to be wrong, be afraid to be silent"

"Not being a part of the normal world is how you succeed in life…. If you are doing what everyone else is doing then you will not stand out…."

Context

Both quotes belong to the asking the right question / be your own original / voluntary adversity cluster — exactly the founder-frames Yahir was simultaneously absorbing from ahmad jamal, antonio garcia martinez, and chamath palihapitiya during the same Oct–Dec 2022 stretch. Cassidy's role in that constellation: an in-person voice transmitting the same frame Yahir was reading in book-form elsewhere.
